products.name: AeroFIS®
products.descriptor: Fully automated airborne flight inspection system for navigation system calibration and validation

evidence.snippet:
AeroFIS®
--------
Flight inspection with precision
Maximum accuracy, integrity and reliable results - our AeroFIS® flight inspection system offers all of this. It is not only characterised by minimal personnel deployment and short flight times, but also offers numerous other advantages. Among other things, AeroFIS® can be used to create flight inspection reports during the flight.

products.name: AeroFIS® Flybot
products.descriptor: Multicopter UAS equipped with flight inspection sensors for navigation system calibration

evidence.snippet: Our AeroFIS® Flybot is a small unmanned aircraft system (UAS) equipped with measuring devices and based on a multicopter. The AeroFIS® Flybot makes it possible to inspect navigation systems in a simple and cost-effective way.

products.name: HeliFIS®
products.descriptor: Helicopter-based flight inspection system built on AeroFIS® hardware modules

evidence.snippet:
HeliFIS®
--------
The efficient solution for helicopters
It is important to us to make our solutions as flexible as possible to enable versatile use. This is why Aerodata has developed HeliFIS®, an efficient solution for helicopters. The system is based on the AeroFIS® hardware modules and enables flight inspection services to be carried out with helicopters.

products.name: AeroMission®
products.descriptor: Modular airborne mission management system integrating sensors, effectors and comms for surveillance

evidence.snippet:
AeroMission®, our integrated mission management system, is the solution for all airborne surveillance and reconnaissance scenarios.
The biggest advantage: the system is **modular** and can be **configured** according to **customer requirements**. Extensions and **adaptations** to the system are possible at any time on the basis of the modular approach.

products.name: AeroForce® X
products.descriptor: MALE UAS for maritime surveillance and reconnaissance, ITAR-free, up to 40 h endurance

evidence.snippet:
With AeroForce® X, we offer an innovative, tailor-made complete solution that meets the growing demands in the field of intelligent surveillance and reconnaissance (ISR).
The modular concept of our MALE UAS enables an adaptable design for a wide range of maritime surveillance scenarios.
The platform is ITAR-free, which means it can be used in international missions without US restrictions.

products.notes: Page explicitly states ITAR-free but no NDAA claim; hence not_disclosed.

products.name: Prometheon
products.descriptor: Multi-domain information management system for real-time surveillance and reconnaissance C2

products.name: OctoPod
products.descriptor: Belly-mounted multi-sensor pod for airborne maritime surveillance, up to eight sensors

evidence.snippet:
The OctoPod is our integrated package solution for the external installation of various monitoring sensors on the aircraft.
It is mounted underneath an aircraft fuselage and enables multi-sensor-based maritime surveillance missions from the air with minimal space requirements in the cabin and little effort for aircraft modification.

products.name: MEDUSA®
products.descriptor: Airborne mission system for maritime surveillance, used with the OctoPod sensor pod

evidence.snippet: The OctoPod is used in conjunction with our AeroMission and MEDUSA® mission systems.
Full mission system integration with AeroMission® & MEDUSA®

products.notes: Only briefly mentioned on the OctoPod page; no dedicated product page was fetched. Readiness and detail unknown.

products.name: OPTIMARE SLAR
products.descriptor: X-band side-looking airborne radar for day/night maritime observation and oil spill mapping

evidence.snippet:
##### 4\. Side-Looking Airborne Radar (SLAR)
The OPTIMARE SLAR is a cloud-penetrating imaging X-band radar for day & night airborne maritime observation. It is used for mapping the sea surface with regard to oil spills, vessels, wakes and many more. The lightweight SLAR with its outstanding performance and its unique ultra-thin antenna design is the SLAR solution of choice.

products.name: IR/UV Line Scanner
products.descriptor: Airborne IR/UV sensor for oil spill monitoring and relative oil thickness visualization

evidence.snippet:
##### 5\. IR/UV Line Scanner
The IR/UV Line Scanner is a standard sensor for airborne oil spill monitoring. It is capable of visualizing relative oil thickness. The OPTIMARE IR/UV Line Scanner is characterized by a unique optical design, an excellent maintainability and a broad operating temperature range.

products.name: VIS Line Scanner
products.descriptor: Ruggedized visible-wavelength (400–675 nm) airborne remote sensor for geo-referenced RGB maritime imagery

evidence.snippet:
##### 6\. VIS Line Scanner
The OPTIMARE VIS Line Scanner is a ruggedized, lightweight remote sensor operating at visible wavelengths (400 to 675 nanometres). In maritime surveillance, the system is used for acquisition of highly resolved geo-referenced Red/Green/Blue composite images. These images can be used for documentation and for supporting volume estimations based on oil appearance codes.

products.name: LFS-P Laser Fluorosensor
products.descriptor: Fourth-generation compact nadir-looking airborne laser fluorosensor for day/night oil spill classification

products.name: MWR-P Microwave Radiometer
products.descriptor: Third-generation airborne microwave radiometer for oil spill thickness distribution and volume analysis

evidence.snippet:
##### 8\. Microwave Radiometer (MWR-P)
The OPTIMARE MWR-P is OPTIMARE’s third generation microwave radiometer for airborne analysis of oil spills in terms of thickness distribution and volume. Two decades of experience in microwave radiometry enabled OPTIMARE to develop a microwave radiometer with roughly one-half in volume and weight compared to its predecessor.
